_doc: Hand-labeled ground truth for 'template example/Black and white template.pptx'. Per slide, shape_ids that are genuine fillable TEXT content slots (title, headings, body, brand/presenter/date). Everything else on each slide (freeforms, groups, dividers, off-slide bleeds, grouped images, and sequence-number micro-boxes) is decoration. Labels established by visually inspecting LibreOffice-rendered previews of slides 0-3.
